title: lychnis dioica var. sylvestris
intro: Lychnis dioica var. sylvestris, also known as the woodland campion, is a variety of flowering plant in the caryophyllaceae family, native to Northern Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its alkaloids and flavonoids. The woodland campion offers various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and acting as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
